Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the harness.

HarnessId.description: The unique identifier of the harness.

Version.description: The version of the harness. Incremented on every successful update.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the harness was created.

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the harness was last updated.

Memory.ManagedMemoryConfiguration.Arn.description: The ARN of the managed memory resource. Read-only, populated by the service.

Environment.AgentCoreRuntimeEnvironment..description: The ARN of the underlying AgentCore Runtime.
The name of the underlying AgentCore Runtime.
The ID of the underlying AgentCore Runtime.

ContainerUri.description: The ECR URI of the container.

PrivateEndpoint.description: Private endpoint configuration for connecting to the OpenID Connect discovery endpoint over a private network.

EfsAccessPointConfiguration.description: Configuration for an Amazon EFS access point to mount into the AgentCore Runtime.

EfsAccessPoint.description: Configuration for an Amazon EFS access point to mount into the AgentCore Runtime.

S3FilesAccessPoint.description: Configuration for an Amazon S3 Files access point to mount into the AgentCore Runtime.

AgentRuntimeArn.description: The ARN of the underlying AgentCore Runtime.

AgentRuntimeId.description: The ID of the underlying AgentCore Runtime.

AgentRuntimeName.description: The name of the underlying AgentCore Runtime.

InputSchema.description: JSON Schema describing the tool's input parameters.

Arn.description: The ARN of the managed memory resource. Read-only, populated by the service.

EncryptionKeyArn.description: Customer-managed KMS key ARN. Defaults to AWS-owned key. Not updatable after creation.

EventExpiryDuration.description: Event retention in days. Defaults to 30.

Strategies.description: Strategy types to enable. Defaults to [SEMANTIC, SUMMARIZATION].

HarnessManagedMemoryConfiguration.description: Configuration for managed memory. The harness creates and manages a memory resource in the customer's account.

ManagedMemoryConfiguration.description: Configuration for managed memory. The harness creates and manages a memory resource in the customer's account.

AwsSkills.description: AWS Skills baked into the Harness's underlying Runtime.

Git.description: A git repository containing the skill, cloned over HTTPS.

Path.description: The filesystem path to the skill definition.

S3.description: An S3 source containing the skill.

Paths.description: Optionally filter allowed skills with glob syntax, e.g., ['core-skills/*'].

HarnessSkillAwsSkillsSource.description: AWS Skills baked into the Harness's underlying Runtime.

CredentialArn.description: The ARN of the credential in AgentCore Identity containing the password or personal access token.

Username.description: Username for authentication. Defaults to 'oauth2' if not specified.

HarnessSkillGitAuth.description: Authentication configuration for accessing a private git repository.

Auth.description: Authentication configuration for accessing a private git repository.

Path.description: Subdirectory within the repository containing the skill.

Url.description: The HTTPS URL of the git repository.

HarnessSkillGitSource.description: A git repository containing the skill, cloned over HTTPS.

Uri.description: The S3 URI pointing to the skill directory (e.g., s3://bucket/skills/my-skill/).

HarnessSkillS3Source.description: An S3 source containing the skill.

Text.description: The text content of the system prompt block.

ManagedVpcResource.description: Configuration for a service-managed VPC endpoint.
Configuration for a service-managed VPC endpoint.

SelfManagedLatticeResource.description: Configuration for connecting to a private resource using a self-managed VPC Lattice resource configuration.

PrivateEndpoint.description: Private endpoint configuration for connecting to the OpenID Connect discovery endpoint over a private network.
Private endpoint configuration for connecting to the OpenID Connect discovery endpoint over a private network.

PrivateEndpointOverride.description: Maps a domain to a private endpoint for resolving that domain over a private network.

S3FilesAccessPointConfiguration.description: Configuration for an Amazon S3 Files access point to mount into the AgentCore Runtime.

SelfManagedLatticeResource.description: Configuration for connecting to a private resource using a self-managed VPC Lattice resource configuration.

description: Resource Type definition for AWS::BedrockAgentCore::Harness - a managed agentic loop service that provides a turnkey solution for running stateful, tool-equipped AI agents.

AllowedTools.description: The tools that the agent is allowed to use.

EnvironmentVariables.description: Environment variables to set in the harness runtime environment.

ExecutionRoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that the harness assumes when running.

MaxIterations.description: The maximum number of iterations the agent loop can execute per invocation.

MaxTokens.description: The maximum number of tokens the agent can generate per iteration.

Skills.description: The skills available to the agent.

SystemPrompt.description: The system prompt that defines the agent's behavior.

Tags.description: Tags to apply to the harness resource.

TimeoutSeconds.description: The maximum duration in seconds for the agent loop execution per invocation.

Tools.description: The tools available to the agent.
